name: skill-market-codex
description: Provides Codex skills for searching, downloading, disabling, uninstalling, updating, and uploading Skill Market entries through git and pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Search, download, disable, update, uninstall, and upload marketplace skills.
interface.longDescription: Manage Skill Market entries from a remote Git repository with local cache support and PR-based uploads.
defaultPrompt: Search Skill Market for a skill.
Disable a local Skill Market skill.
Upload this skill through a PR.
